board.title: Decision Cockpit
board.subtitle: Learning from execution actuals.
board.empty: Nothing scheduled yet — Re-solve to generate a draft.

stale.banner: Plan stale — actuals have drifted past threshold. Re-solve to apply the learned values.

perf.title: Performance — planned vs actual
perf.empty: No actuals yet — recorded after this version runs.

board.closedDay: Closed — no shift scheduled this day

pred.horizon: Predicted to cross the wear line in {{horizon}} (~{{time}})
pred.horizonNone: Predicted to cross within the horizon
pred.basis: Forecast from the trend over {{count}} actuals — not yet measured
pred.downstream: Downstream: {{count}} op(s) on {{resource}} — kept fed by the pre-emptive adjustment
pred.downstreamStale: Downstream: {{count}} op(s) on {{resource}} — protected once you re-solve to apply the learned cycle (plan stale)
pred.downstreamForecast: Downstream: {{count}} op(s) on {{resource}} — at risk if the wear crosses (advisory)
pred.downstreamNone: No downstream ops affected this horizon
pred.healthy: No wear signal — running on standard.

down.subtitle: Line offline
down.title: This line is down
down.body: Down {{from}}–{{to}} — {{count}} op(s) overlap the outage and need re-sequencing around it.

lever.material: expedite the material or move the date
lever.working_window: add overtime or a shift, or move the date
lever.capacity: reprioritize, add overtime, or move the date
lever.due_before_start: re-sequencing won't help; renegotiate the date or expedite
lever.resource_downtime: reroute to another line, add overtime, or move the date

lateness.dueTimed: due {{due}}, but the line can't start until {{start}} — re-sequencing won't help; renegotiate the date or expedite
lateness.hopPredecessor: {{order}} op {{opSeq}} · {{resource}} — waiting on its earlier op

learned.noAdjustment: Running on standard times — not enough actuals to adopt a learned value.
learned.accruing: Running on standard times — {{count}} actuals so far, not enough to adopt a learned value yet.
learned.staleAdopted: Learned cycle adopted (+{{delta}}% from {{count}} actuals), but this committed plan still runs standard — re-solve to apply it.
learned.selectHint: Select a learned (ml) bar to see how it converged.
learned.none: No learned values yet — run the simulator to feed actuals.

wear.title: Tool-wear flagged
wear.triggerBody: Cycle drift on {{resource}} crossed threshold — flagged. Schedule re-sequenced to protect downstream from starvation.
wear.triggerBodyStale: Cycle drift on {{resource}} crossed threshold — flagged and a learned cycle adopted. This committed plan still runs standard: re-solve to apply it and re-sequence to protect downstream.
wear.preadjustBody: Cycle drift on {{resource}} — pre-emptively adjusted for the predicted wear and re-sequenced to protect downstream. Not yet crossed: acting on the forecast (reversible if it doesn't materialize).
wear.preadjustBodyStale: Cycle drift on {{resource}} — predicted wear pre-adopted, but this committed plan still runs standard. Re-solve to apply it and re-sequence to protect downstream. Not yet crossed (reversible if it doesn't materialize).
wear.forecastBody: Cycle drift on {{resource}} is approaching the wear line — advisory. Not yet crossed; the schedule still runs on standard.

simulator.title: Scenario launcher
simulator.subtitle: Demo fixture — inject a condition or evaluate a disruption against the real engine. Not part of the product.
simulator.needCommitted: Select a committed version to simulate.
simulator.operatorHint: Sets an operator's efficiency (percent of standard) or swaps the operator on a line. Re-solve the Board to see the new run times — higher % = faster, lower % = slower.
simulator.conditionOperator: Performance updated — re-solve the Board to apply it.
simulator.conditionAssignment: Operator assigned — re-solve the Board to apply it.
simulator.conditionMaterial: Condition set — material arrival time changed.
simulator.wearHint: Mutates state: feeds seeded actuals (with optional wear drift) into the closed loop → learning + predictions.
simulator.conditionHint: Sets the condition in the data (does not re-solve). Open the Board to review options and apply.
simulator.noActiveDowntime: No active outage on this line.
simulator.goToBoard: Open the Board (this plant) — it shows the condition with options to review and apply.
